name: Margin %
expression: -- This measure calculates the margin percentage, which represents the margin as a percentage of the sales amount.
DIVIDE ( -- DIVIDE performs division and handles cases where the denominator is zero, returning BLANK() in such cases.
[Margin], -- The numerator is the 'Margin' measure, representing the profit amount.
[Sales Amount] -- The denominator is the 'Sales Amount' measure, representing the total sales revenue.
